headline: Middle-income homebuyers have $30,000 more buying power than a year ago, research finds. It's still not enough
summary: While the amount that a median-income household can afford is higher than it was a year ago, it is still below the median price for a single-family home.

raw.headline: Middle-income homebuyers have $30,000 more buying power than a year ago, research finds. It's still not enough

headline: PulteGroup Expands Florida Lot Pipeline While Valuation Signals Mixed Picture
summary: PulteGroup (NYSE:PHM) announced a new builder relationship with The St. Joe Company for thousands of future homesites in Florida. The agreement covers multiple planned communities and is structured to roll out over several future phases. The partnership expands PulteGroup’s access to residential lots in a key Sun Belt state that continues to attract new residents. PulteGroup focuses on residential homebuilding across a range of price points, and Florida is one of the most closely watched...
